title: 424Friends Paintings Pack
description: This resource pack is a lightweight version of the full 424Friends Resource Pack, by only containing modified paintings which have been replaced with 424Friends themed paintings using our official logos and icons.
body:
This resource pack is a lightweight version of the full 424Friends Resource Pack, by only containing modified paintings which have been replaced with 424Friends themed paintings using our official logos and icons.
Go to the images/screenshots tab to see what paintings have been replaced and what with.


You can find the full 424Friends Resource Pack at the link below...
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/four-two-four-friends

 

You can join and find out more about the 424Friends community using the link below...
https://discord.gg/kNhbpvS
